rawIndexableTextContent: Creates a container with a new ModelContainer from SwiftData model types at a specific store URL.  The ensemble identifier, used to match ensembles on other devices. The file URL for the SQLite persistent store. The @Model types to include. The cloud backend for sync data exchange. Options controlling auto-sync behavior and compatibility.
title: init(name:storeURL:modelTypes:cloudFileSystem:configuration:)
summary: Creates a container with a new ModelContainer from SwiftData model types at a specific store URL.

rawIndexableTextContent: Attach the persistent store and register with the cloud backend.
title: attachPersistentStore()
summary: Attach the persistent store and register with the cloud backend.

rawIndexableTextContent: The SwiftData model container.
title: modelContainer
summary: The SwiftData model container.

rawIndexableTextContent: Whether the ensemble is currently attached to the cloud.
title: isAttached
summary: Whether the ensemble is currently attached to the cloud.

rawIndexableTextContent: Creates a container that builds a full SwiftData stack, automatically choosing a store location.  The ensemble identifier, also used to derive the store file name. The @Model types to include. The cloud backend for sync data exchange. Options controlling auto-sync behavior and compatibility. Discussion The store is placed at Application Support/{name}.sqlite, matching the convention used by NSPersistentContainer. Event data is stored alongside the store.
title: init(name:modelTypes:cloudFileSystem:configuration:)
summary: Creates a container that builds a full SwiftData stack, automatically choosing a store location.

rawIndexableTextContent: Supply global identifiers for managed objects to enable automatic deduplication.  Discussion Return stable, immutable identifiers so that Ensembles can match corresponding objects inserted on different devices and merge them. Return nil at a position where you do not wish to assign a custom identifier.
title: swiftDataEnsemble(_:globalIdentifiersForManagedObjects:)
summary: Supply global identifiers for managed objects to enable automatic deduplication.

rawIndexableTextContent: Detach the persistent store and remove local sync metadata.
title: detachPersistentStore()
summary: Detach the persistent store and remove local sync metadata.

rawIndexableTextContent: The activity the ensemble is currently performing, if any.
title: currentActivity
summary: The activity the ensemble is currently performing, if any.

rawIndexableTextContent: The delegate that receives sync callbacks.  Discussion The ensemble retains its delegate. If your delegate holds a reference back to the ensemble, use a weak reference to avoid a retain cycle.
title: delegate
summary: The delegate that receives sync callbacks.

rawIndexableTextContent: Whether the ensemble is currently attached to its persistent store.
title: isAttached
summary: Whether the ensemble is currently attached to its persistent store.

rawIndexableTextContent: Called when a sync error occurs during automatic syncing.
title: didEncounterError
summary: Called when a sync error occurs during automatic syncing.

rawIndexableTextContent: Stop syncing and remove local sync metadata.
title: detach()
summary: Stop syncing and remove local sync metadata.

rawIndexableTextContent: The underlying Core Data ensemble. Use this for advanced delegate methods or configuration not exposed by SwiftDataEnsemble.
title: ensemble
summary: The underlying Core Data ensemble. Use this for advanced delegate methods or configuration not exposed by SwiftDataEnsemble.

rawIndexableTextContent: A protocol for SwiftData @Model types that declare a global identifier property for Ensembles deduplication.  Overview Conform to this protocol and provide the name of the stored property that holds each object’s stable, unique identifier:  When all model types conform to Syncable, you don’t need to set a SwiftDataEnsembleDelegate — the ensemble discovers the identifier properties automatically at init time.
title: Syncable
summary: A protocol for SwiftData @Model types that declare a global identifier property for Ensembles deduplication.

rawIndexableTextContent: The configuration used to create this container.
title: configuration
summary: The configuration used to create this container.

rawIndexableTextContent: Default persistent store options for SwiftData integration.  Discussion Enables persistent history tracking so that SwiftData automatically detects changes written by the ensemble’s internal coordinator.
title: defaultPersistentStoreOptions
summary: Default persistent store options for SwiftData integration.

rawIndexableTextContent: The default directory for storing persistent data, matching NSPersistentContainer.defaultDirectoryURL().
title: defaultDirectoryURL
summary: The default directory for storing persistent data, matching NSPersistentContainer.defaultDirectoryURL().

rawIndexableTextContent: Delegate protocol for SwiftDataEnsemble.  Overview Provides the same global-identifier hook as CoreDataEnsembleDelegate but scoped to the SwiftData API surface. Use key-value coding on the supplied NSManagedObject instances to read model properties (e.g. object.value(forKey: "uniqueID")). For the common case where each model type has a single identifier property, prefer conforming your @Model types to Syncable instead.
title: SwiftDataEnsembleDelegate
summary: Delegate protocol for SwiftDataEnsemble.

rawIndexableTextContent: Create an ensemble from SwiftData model types (single version).  A unique identifier matching corresponding ensembles on other devices. The file URL of the SQLite store shared by SwiftData and Ensembles. The @Model types to include. The cloud backend to use for sync data exchange. Options for the persistent store. Defaults to enabling persistent history tracking, which allows SwiftData to automatically detect changes merged by the ensemble. Custom root directory for event data storage. Pass nil (the default) to use the standard application support location.
title: init(ensembleIdentifier:persistentStoreURL:modelTypes:cloudFileSystem:persistentStoreOptions:localDataRootDirectoryURL:)
summary: Create an ensemble from SwiftData model types (single version).

rawIndexableTextContent: Sync local and remote changes.
title: sync()
summary: Sync local and remote changes.

rawIndexableTextContent: Attach if needed and merge changes with peers.  Discussion This is the primary sync entry point. It attaches the store on first call and then merges. Returns true on success, false on failure.
title: sync()
summary: Attach if needed and merge changes with peers.

rawIndexableTextContent: Create an ensemble from a SwiftData migration plan (multiple versions).  A unique identifier matching corresponding ensembles on other devices. The file URL of the SQLite store shared by SwiftData and Ensembles. A SchemaMigrationPlan type listing all known schema versions. The cloud backend to use for sync data exchange. Options for the persistent store. Defaults to enabling persistent history tracking, which allows SwiftData to automatically detect changes merged by the ensemble. Custom root directory for event data storage. Pass nil (the default) to use the standard application support location. Discussion All schema versions listed in the migration plan are used for entity hash comparison, which allows Ensembles to accept events recorded against any known model version.
title: init(ensembleIdentifier:persistentStoreURL:migrationPlan:cloudFileSystem:persistentStoreOptions:localDataRootDirectoryURL:)
summary: Create an ensemble from a SwiftData migration plan (multiple versions).

rawIndexableTextContent: Creates a container from an existing ModelContainer.  The ensemble identifier, used to match ensembles on other devices. An existing SwiftData model container. The @Model types used in the container. The cloud backend for sync data exchange. Options controlling auto-sync behavior and compatibility.
title: init(name:modelContainer:modelTypes:cloudFileSystem:configuration:)
summary: Creates a container from an existing ModelContainer.

rawIndexableTextContent: Called when the ensemble is forced to detach due to an unexpected issue.
title: didForceDetach
summary: Called when the ensemble is forced to detach due to an unexpected issue.

rawIndexableTextContent: Sync changes with peers using the specified options.  Discussion Unlike sync(), this does not attach automatically and throws on failure.
title: sync(options:)
summary: Sync changes with peers using the specified options.

rawIndexableTextContent: Creates a container with a new ModelContainer from a migration plan.  The ensemble identifier. The file URL for the SQLite persistent store. A SchemaMigrationPlan type listing all known schema versions. The cloud backend for sync data exchange. Options controlling auto-sync behavior and compatibility. Discussion All schema versions listed in the migration plan are used for entity hash comparison.
title: init(name:storeURL:migrationPlan:cloudFileSystem:configuration:)
summary: Creates a container with a new ModelContainer from a migration plan.

rawIndexableTextContent: Convenience wrapper for creating a CoreDataEnsemble from SwiftData model types.  Overview SwiftData models defined with @Model can be converted to Core Data models using NSManagedObjectModel.makeManagedObjectModel(for:). Both SwiftData and Ensembles can share the same SQLite store — no data duplication is needed. SwiftDataEnsemble forwards the key ensemble operations so that you can work entirely at the SwiftData level without importing or interacting with CoreDataEnsemble directly.
title: SwiftDataEnsemble
summary: Convenience wrapper for creating a CoreDataEnsemble from SwiftData model types.

rawIndexableTextContent: The underlying SwiftData ensemble. Use for advanced configuration.
title: ensemble
summary: The underlying SwiftData ensemble. Use for advanced configuration.

rawIndexableTextContent: A high-level container that sets up a SwiftDataEnsemble with automatic syncing and delegate management.  Overview SwiftDataEnsembleContainer reduces the boilerplate required to integrate Ensembles with SwiftData. It can create a ModelContainer from model types or work alongside an existing one.  The container automatically: Triggers sync when a local save is detected (if AutoSyncPolicy/onSave is enabled) Triggers sync when the app becomes active (if AutoSyncPolicy/onActivation is enabled) Triggers sync on a timer (if AutoSyncPolicy/onTimer is enabled) For manual control, set the auto sync policy to AutoSyncPolicy/manual and call sync() yourself.
title: SwiftDataEnsembleContainer
summary: A high-level container that sets up a SwiftDataEnsemble with automatic syncing and delegate management.
